title: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta’ Euro 80,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
title_en: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta’ Euro 80,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/161.83/mlt, expression eli/sl/161.83/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 316 tal-2009
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ din id-Direttiva hu Direttiva mill-Ministru talFinanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment g]all-}ru[ ta’ Euro 80,000,000
Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
G]andu jin]are[ ammont ta’ Euro 80,000,000 Stock talGvern ta’ Malta kif [ej:

}ru[ ta’ Stock.

(a) 3.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) Fungibility
Issue, u
(b) 4.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2020 (II), u
(`) Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (V) b’Rata ta’ Mg]ax li
Tvarja marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt xhur, jew
(d) f’ammonti mit-tliet Stocks imsemmija hawn qabel
b’valur nominali flimkien ta’ Euro 80,000,000.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Il-]ru[ ta’ Stocks ser isir kif stipulat fil-prospett relattiv li
jirregola l-]ru[ ta’:

Mod tal-]ru[ ta’
Stocks.

(a) 3.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) Fungibility
Issue u 4.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2020 (II); u
(b) Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (V) b’Rata ta’ Mg]ax li
Tvarja marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt xhur.

provisions.title: Tvarja marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt xhur
provisions.content:
Kull persuna u, jew enti jistg]u japplikaw g]al dawn liStocks. It-tqassim tal-iStocks isir kif hemm spjegat fil-prospett
relattiv.

Policy dwar lallokazzjoni ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
(1) Ta]t id-dispo\izzjonijiet tal-Att dwar is-Swieq
Fin anzjar ji meta d awn l- iSto cks ji[u allok ati, g] an dh a ssir
applikazzjoni sabiex kull Stock jitqieg]ed fuq il-lista uffi`jali u
biex ikun negozjat fil-Bor\a ta’ Malta.

Negozju fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.
Kap. 345.

(2) Fit-18 ta’ April, 2010, wara l-pagament tal-ewwel img]ax,
kull ammont allokat fit-3.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV)
FI ji[i integrat mal-]ru[ e\istenti ta’ dan l-iStock u wara, dawn i\\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock wie]ed.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Is-somma ta’ flus li g]andha tin[abar bl-iStocks
imsemmija flimkien tkun ta’ Euro 80,000,000. L-Accountant
General jirriserva d-dritt li j\id is-somma li g]andha tin[abar
b’ammont ta’ mhux i\jed minn Euro 20,000,000.

Somma ta’ flus li
g]andha tin[abar.

provisions.title: g]andha tin[abar
provisions.content: (1) L-img]ax bir-rata ta’ Euro 1.80 g]al kull Euro 100,

provisions.title: Fidwa ta’ Stock
provisions.content:
(1) It-3.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-18 ta’Ottubru, 2013.
(2) L-4.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2020 (II) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fil-25 ta’ April, 2020.
(3) Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (V) b’Rata ta’ Mg]ax li
Tvarja marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt (6) xhur ji[i mifdi b’parità fil25 ta’ Ottubru, 2015.
